tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                        TURN THE BEAT AROUND - Gloria Estefan
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tabbed by: ephemeral_style

I play the F sharp minor as a powerchord.


CHORUS:
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Turn the beat around[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Love to hear the percussion[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Turn it upside down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Love to hear the percussion[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Love to hear it[/tab]


[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Blow horns you sure sound pretty[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Your violins keep movin' to the nitty gritty[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
When you hear the scratch of the guitars scratchin'[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Then you'll know that rhythm carries all the action, so[/tab]


CHORUS (see above)


[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Flute player play your flute 'cause[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I know that you want to get your thing off[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
But you see I've made up my mind about it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
It's got to be the rhythm, no doubt about it, woah woah[/tab]


BRIDGE THING:

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
'Cause when the guitar player start playing[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
With the syncopated rhythm, with the scratch, scratch, scratch[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]
Makes me wanna move my body yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
And when the drummer starts beating that beat[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
He nails that beat with the syncopated rhythm[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
With the rat, tat, tat, tat, tat, tat on the drums, hey[/tab]


CHORUS x2
